title: Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates:
Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates!
